summary: Login screen blinking/refresh loop bug fix verified. All 12 tests passed. Login flow works without blinking, loading spinner shows during auth check, successful login redirects to dashboard, invalid credentials show error without loop, and crash log is cleared on login.

features_tested.feature: Login page loads without blinking/refresh loop
features_tested.details: Page loads correctly, no refresh loop detected after 3 seconds

features_tested.feature: Loading spinner shows during initial auth check
features_tested.details: Spinner with animate-spin class detected on page load with token
Valid credentials (superadmin@bijnisbooks.com) redirect to dashboard without blinking

features_tested.feature: Invalid credentials show error without causing loop
features_tested.details: Invalid login stays on login page, no refresh loop after 3+ seconds
Valid token in storage - page refresh stays on dashboard, no blinking
After 5 seconds wait post-login, dashboard remains stable
Logout button redirects to login page

features_tested.feature: Crash log cleared on successful login
Safe Mode doesn't trigger during login
features_tested.details: Safe Mode check only runs after auth loads AND user is logged in

fix_1_initial_auth_check.description: Uses direct fetch() instead of api() function for initial auth check

fix_3_safe_mode_check.description: Safe Mode check condition: !loading && user && shouldEnterSafeMode()

fix_4_error_filtering.description: Filters out 401, Network, Session expired errors from crash log

fix_5_loading_separation.description: Separated loading checks: auth loading first, then permissions loading (only if user)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login blinking bug is fully fixed. Key fixes in App.js: (1) Initial auth uses direct fetch() at lines 197-234, (2) Crash log cleared on login at line 312, (3) Safe Mode only checks after auth+user at lines 909-916, (4) Error filtering at lines 921-943, (5) Separated loading states at lines 946-962. All login flows tested and working.
